architectural_purpose: deterministic operational lifecycle drift detection without remediation or execution

findings.explanation: Source and target lifecycle identity keys differ.
Replay continuity references changed without executing replay behavior.
Rollback continuity references changed without executing rollback behavior.
Lifecycle lineage records changed without applying lifecycle transitions.
Lifecycle provenance records changed without inferring or correcting provenance.
Lifecycle state classifications or fail-visible state metadata changed.

explicit_limitations: v4.0 Phase 2 detects lifecycle drift but does not correct drift.
v4.0 Phase 2 detects lifecycle drift but does not remediate drift.
v4.0 Phase 2 does not authorize lifecycle changes.
v4.0 Phase 2 does not execute patch refresh behavior.
v4.0 Phase 2 does not enable routing, scheduling, dispatch, orchestration, or runtime mutation.
